name: flow-office php
postCreateCommand: cd backend && composer install && if [ ! -f .env ]; then cp .env.example .env; fi && php artisan key:generate && if [ ! -f database/database.sqlite ]; then touch database/database.sqlite; fi && cd ../frontend && npm install
postStartCommand: echo 'Use: cd backend && php artisan serve --host=0.0.0.0 --port=8000'
